subcodes.first_line: O ye divine friends! The lamp of guidance shineth bright, and the garden of hearts hath become the envy of rose-garden and meadow. The horizon of contingent being is illumined by the rays of the Realm Beyond [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی شمع هدی روشن و ساحت دلها رشک گلزار و چمن افق امکان از پرتو لامکان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
